notes: Most unmatched countries are now covered by either direct data entry or mappings. The remaining truly missing territories are: French Southern and Antarctic Lands, Kosovo, Northern Cyprus, New Caledonia, Palestine, Puerto Rico, and Somaliland - which are either not in standard country lists or disputed territories.
